title: contingency-dsl Core-TrialBased AST
description: AST node definitions for Core-TrialBased layer schedules. Additive to schema/core/ast.schema.json — ScheduleExpr.oneOf gains TrialBased.

TrialBased.description: A discrete-trial schedule. Response opportunities are structured as trials (stimulus presentation → selection → consequence → ITI), unlike free-operant Core/Core-Stateful schedules.

trial_type.description: Trial-based procedure type. v1.x: MTS only.

comparisons.description: Number of comparison stimuli per trial (Cumming & Berryman, 1965).

consequence.description: Core schedule executed on correct response.

incorrect.description: Core schedule executed on incorrect response. Default: EXT.

ITI.description: Inter-trial interval value in canonical unit.

mts_type.description: Matching type. identity: physical match. arbitrary: class-based match (requires @stimulus_classes).
